raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Baggatibu / nn warren dauds das Semmi / Pineafu Eeleasara
Lohpeem/ar Sudrabu un ar Sel-
tu/un ar Warzu/un ar Dselſi/un
ar fohti dauds Drehebm/dallajt
juhſu Genaidneeku Laupijumu ar
juhſeem Brahteein.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tä atgreeſahs Ruhbera
Behrni / un Gada Behrni /
un ta puſs Zilts Manaffus / un
aiſgahje no teem Israëta Behr-
neem no Sihlus / tas trr eekſeh
Kanaäna Semmes/ nn gahje us
Gileadas Semmi/us fawu ihpa-
schu Semmi / eekſch ka tee var
Mantneekeem bija eezelti pehz ta
KUNGA Mutti zaur Mohsu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tee nu us Jardanas Roh-
beschahm nahze/kas eekſch Kanaä-
na Seines trr/tad uszehle Ruhbe-
na Behrni/ un Gada Behrni/ un
ta puſs Zilts Manaffus tur wee-
nu Altari pee Jardanas / weenu
leetu janfu Altari usluhfoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Israëta Behrni
dsirdeja faktau: Naugi / Ruh-
bena Behrni/ nn Gada Behrni/
un ta puſs Zilts Manaffus / trr
weenu Altari uszehluschi Kanaä-
na Semmet pretti/ pee tahm Jar-
danas Rohbeschahm/ fchai Isra-
etä Behrnu Puſſe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad Israëta Behrni to
dsirdeja/tad Sapulzejahs wiffa I-
ſraëta Behrnu Draudse eekſch
Sihlus/ ka tee pretti winneem zet-
tohs ar Ratra-Spehku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Israëta Behrni fuhtija
pee Ruhbera Behrneem / un pee
Gada Behrneem / un pee tahs
puſs Zilts Manaffus us Gilen-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un defmits Wirfneekus
ar winzu / no tweena Tehwa
Namma weenu Wirfneeku / no
wiſſahm Israëta Ziltiu / un te-
weens no teem bija tas Augſtajs
winzo Tehwu Nammä / pahr
teem Israëta tuhfſtoscheeni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee nahze pee Ruhbera
Behrneem / un pee Gada Behr-
neem / un pee tahs puſs Zilts
Manaffus Gileadas Semmê /
un runnaja ar teem / nn fazztja:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tä fakka wiffa ta KUN-
GA Draudse: Kahds Noseegums
irr tas? zaur ko juhs prett Isra-
eta Deewu efat noseegutchees
atgreeſdamees fhodeen no ta
KUNGA Paklaufschanas/ zau-
to/ ka juhs feewim weenu Altar
effat uhstaftijschi/ prettiturrede
mees fhodeen tam KUNGAM
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Irr mums tas Peora No-
seegums wehl mas? no ka mel-
ne effim fchtihstiinschees lib-
fchat paschaf Deenat / jepſchn
Mohziba eekſch ta KUNG
Draudsisas irr bijust.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs atgreeſchate
fhodeen no ta KUNGA Pakla-
fischanas/tad tas notifs/kad ju-
tam KUNGAM prettiturre-
tees fhodeen / tad wiſsch r
pahr wiffu Israëta Draudsi d
inoſees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs fchkeetat j
fu eemantotu Semmi neschkil-
eſtam/ tad nahzeet pahri uš
KUNGA ihpaschu Semuni/
Mmm 3
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
